case_title: TEH PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEH PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAILBONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEH PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAILBONDS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEH PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAILBONDS
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TEH PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
